a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: Based on the expert estimates and index by V-Dem, weighted by countries' populations. It captures the extent to which
women are free from forced labor, have property rights and access to the justice system, and enjoy freedoms of
movement. The variables ranges from 0 to 1 (most rights).
